brief.targetAudience: Adults who want replace coffee with healthy green teas

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee-to-tea switchers need expert validation to trust a new daily ritual — an authority frame from a credentialed source removes the 'but is it actually good?' objection instantly.
copyOptions.visual_description: The Organica Tulsi Green Tea box is placed upright and centered on a loosely draped natural linen textile, shot against a warm off-white matte background with no distracting texture. Lighting is soft and diffused from the upper-left, casting a subtle directional shadow that adds depth without harshness, keeping the product packaging fully legible and crisp. A small dried tulsi or herb sprig rests to the left of the box and a loosely rolled linen napkin sits to the right, reinforcing a clean, organic, health-conscious editorial mood.
headlines: Your new morning ritual starts here
subheadlines: Nutritionist-endorsed Tulsi Green Tea delivers calm energy — without the crash or the jitters.
Backed by Ayurvedic tradition and reviewed by wellness experts. Real energy. Zero anxiety.
Dietitian-approved and stress-tested. Organica Tulsi gives you focus coffee never could.
